commission.notes: Skimlinks confirms 5% flat. Awin (DE) affiliate insights suggest 7–12% range. Commission not explicitly displayed on Awin program rows — use insights text + Skimlinks FAQ as reference.

networks.name: Awin (DE)
networks.notes: HIGHEST EPC and CVR in AnkerMake network set. 10.56% conversion is 92% above Electronics & Computing category average (5.49%). $700+ AOV signals printer hardware (not accessories) driving value.

networks.name: Awin (GB)
networks.notes: Mid-tier EPC. CVR 5.72% still above Electronics avg.

networks.name: Awin (US)
networks.notes: Notably low EPC ($0.05). US program underperforming vs DE/GB — likely lower publisher activation or smaller audience. CVR not reported.

networks.name: Skimlinks
networks.notes: Low AOV ($14.91) vs Awin DE ($700). Suggests Skimlinks traffic is accessories/filament buyers, not printer buyers. Different publisher profile than Awin.

performance_vs_benchmark.vs_category: 92% above average on Awin DE — exceptionally high-intent traffic in 3D printing niche
performance_vs_benchmark.vs_epc: 30% below Electronics & Computing EPC avg on best network — printer AOV gap vs broader CE

ankermake.notes: FIRST FULL DOCUMENTATION of AnkerMake sub-brand in Flywheel audit series. Previously absent from network roster. Key intelligence: Awin DE is the clear best-performing channel. US Awin program is significantly underperforming. The DE/US performance gap (10.56% vs N/A CVR, $0.49 vs $0.05 EPC) is a priority question for Anker affiliate team.

ankerwork.notes: CRITICAL INTELLIGENCE GAP — commission rate UNCONFIRMED for 10th consecutive audit cycle. US and UK program pages confirmed live but rate not publicly disclosed. Escalation to affiliate@anker.com is overdue and escalating.

anker_referral_program.notes: Consumer-facing referral (10% to referrer, 10% discount to referee). Higher incentive than main affiliate program but consumer-only scope.

superchargers_creator_program.notes: Content creator/influencer bridge. High-quality content may convert to traditional affiliate program placement. Key influencer-to-affiliate recruitment pipeline.
